request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Given a prediction-market contract and a single regulatory news record, decide if this record is relevant to whether the contract resolves YES or NO. Score relevance 0-10 (0 = off-topic, 10 = directly determinative). Return JSON matching the schema. one_line_why should be ≤160 chars and explain how this record moves resolution probability.
request.user:
Contract title: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
Resolution criteria: This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
Conditions:
  A: Rihanna album before GTA VI (US) — YES if Rihanna officially releases a new album (e.g., via Rihanna, Spotify, or Apple Music) at a time earlier than GTA VI’s official US release in the US per Rockstar Games/Take‑Two.
Settlement entities: ['Rockstar Games', 'Take-Two Interactive', 'Spotify', 'Apple Music', 'Rihanna']

Record title: Prepared Remarks of CFPB Director Rohit Chopra on the Goldman Sachs and Apple Enforcement Press Call
Record date: 2024-10-23
Record regulator: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau
Record topic: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau
Record entities: ['Apple', 'Consumer Financial Protection Bureau', 'Goldman Sachs', 'Rohit Chopra']

response.one_line_why: CFPB remarks concern Apple/Goldman Sachs financial enforcement, not music release timing or Rockstar/Take‑Two release plans—no impact on album vs GTA VI.
